Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $67,286,731Details
International Box Office $40,800,000
Worldwide Box Office $108,086,731
Further financial details...

Legs:3.57 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:62.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$78,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.4 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,063 opening theaters/3,065 max. theaters, 5.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $129,589,255

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 5th, 2004 (Wide) by Walt Disney
International Releases: March 18th, 2004 (Wide) (Australia)
MPA Rating: PG-13 for adventure violence and some mild innuendo
Running Time: 136 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Non-Drama Biographies
Plot point: Biography, Dysfunctional Family, Horse Racing, Kidnap, Ransom, Rescue, Underdog
Subgenre: Revisionist Western
Time period setting: 1890s
Source:Original Screenplay

Production Countries: United States
